releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Text coloring now works on canvas

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Bold italic fix by @Berenice02 in https://github.com/erincayaz/obsidian-colored-text/pull/52. Now colored text is made bold/italic when the text is already wrapped in asterisk.


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/erincayaz/obsidian-colored-text/compare/1.2.0...1.2.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Bold italic fix by @erincayaz in https://github.com/erincayaz/obsidian-colored-text/pull/46


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/erincayaz/obsidian-colored-text/compare/1.1.1...1.2.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Highlight mode is added
- Now there is a button in status bar which shows the current status of the highlight mode, it can be activated by clicking on it or by using shortcut
- Hide plugin affects highlight mode as well
- Now after coloring the text html will be hided immediately

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Color formatting (bold, italic) now affects colored text as well. However, it only works with the shortcuts and whole text (including HTML elements) should be selected for it to work. The other cases, such as wrapping colored text by hand, removing the color and selecting more than one text with colored text in it are not covered yet. I want to implement those as well however it is hard to do, so I want to first give a way to make colored text bold, italic until then. #20 
- Disable plugin in status bar is added to settings #26 
- Some code cleanup

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add "Remove Color Under Cursor" command by @DPAttila in https://github.com/erincayaz/obsidian-colored-text/pull/21
* Added color remover by @erincayaz in https://github.com/erincayaz/obsidian-colored-text/pull/24

## New Contributors
* @DPAttila made their first contribution in https://github.com/erincayaz/obsidian-colored-text/pull/21

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/erincayaz/obsidian-colored-text/compare/0.4.1...0.5.0

releases.author: erincayaz
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Command names changed
* You can now open color modal by clicking selected color cell


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/erincayaz/obsidian-colored-text/compare/0.4.0...0.4.1

releases.author: erincayaz
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* add favorite colors to color picker and clickable status bar by @rl16432 in https://github.com/erincayaz/obsidian-colored-text/pull/14
* Update manifest.json by @erincayaz in https://github.com/erincayaz/obsidian-colored-text/pull/13

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/erincayaz/obsidian-colored-text/compare/0.3.0...0.4.0

releases.author: erincayaz
releases.description:
- Cursor returns inside span when command is used
- Added context menu, now mouse can be used to change color as well. When mouse is used cursor will be outside span
- Fixed a bug which causes default color to be black when plugin is reloaded
- Changed the name of the setting

## What's Changed
* Update test.yml by @erincayaz in https://github.com/erincayaz/obsidian-colored-text/pull/8
* Return cursor to inside span by @rl16432 in https://github.com/erincayaz/obsidian-colored-text/pull/10
* Added context menu by @erincayaz in https://github.com/erincayaz/obsidian-colored-text/pull/12

## New Contributors
* @rl16432 made their first contribution in https://github.com/erincayaz/obsidian-colored-text/pull/10

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/erincayaz/obsidian-colored-text/compare/0.2.0...0.3.0

releases.author: erincayaz
releases.description:
- You can adjust the count of color cells in the status bar within the range of 1 to 20 through the settings.
- Minor bug fixes
